title: Tick Control in Hewlett, NY | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Hewlett, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed technicians, eco-friendly treatments. Call today!
intro: Hewlett's beautiful residential properties and proximity to green spaces make it an ideal environment for families—but also for ticks that can carry serious diseases. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services throughout Hewlett, protecting your yard, family, and pets from these dangerous pests. Our targeted treatments create a safe barrier around your property, ensuring you can enjoy your outdoor spaces worry-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Hewlett and the Five Towns area with customized tick control solutions. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are effective against all tick species common to Long Island while remaining safe for children and pets.
localContext: Hewlett's tree-lined streets, well-maintained lawns, and proximity to parks like Hewlett Point Park create perfect habitats for deer ticks and other species. The area's mix of established single-family homes with mature landscaping requires specialized tick treatment approaches that address both lawn areas and wooded property borders common throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Hewlett typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May through July. However, mild winters can keep ticks active year-round on Long Island, making preventative treatments important even in cooler months.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Hewlett range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer single treatments as well as seasonal programs with multiple applications for comprehensive protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are specifically designed to be safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Our treatments dry quickly, and we provide clear instructions for re-entry times, typically allowing your family to return to treated areas within 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after tick treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in tick activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Our barrier treatments continue working for 4-6 weeks, providing ongoing protection. For best results, we recommend multiple seasonal applications to maintain a tick-free yard throughout the active season.
